headline: Allegion Weighs DCI Acquisition Benefits Against ERP Execution Risks
summary: Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) has acquired DCI, a move aimed at strengthening its West Coast presence and supply chain footprint. The company is also working through operational disruptions tied to an ERP implementation in its International segment. Both developments are material for Allegion's competitive position and day to day execution and have not yet been covered in prior articles here. Allegion, trading at $137.37, sits at an interesting point for investors watching execution risk and...
